params._amount: - the amount of tokens to convert
params._indexSet: - the set of positions to convert, expressed as an index set where the least significant bit is the first question (index zero)

params._amount: - the amount of collateral to merge
params._collateralToken: - the collateral token, must be the same as the adapter's collateral token

params._amount: - the amount of collateral to merge

params._feeBips: - the fee for the market, out of 10_000

params._marketId: - the id of the market for which to prepare the question

returns._0: questionId - the id of the resulting question

params._amounts: - amounts of conditional tokens to redeem _amounts should always have length 2, with the first element being the amount of yes tokens to redeem and the second element being the amount of no tokens to redeem
params._conditionId: - conditionId of the conditional tokens to redeem

params.admin: - The address of the admin to be removed

params._data: - the data to pass to the recipient
params._value: - the amount of tokens to transfer

params._amount: - the amount of collateral to split
params._collateralToken: - the collateral token, must be the same as the adapter's collateral token

params._amount: - the amount of collateral to split

balanceOf(address,uint256).notice: Proxies ERC1155 balanceOf to the CTF

balanceOfBatch(address[],uint256[]).notice: Proxies ERC1155 balanceOfBatch to the CTF

convertPositions(bytes32,uint256,uint256.notice: Convert a set of no positions to the complementary set of yes positions plus collateral proportional to (# of no positions - 1)If the market has a fee, the fee is taken from both collateral and the yes positions

getConditionId(bytes32).notice: Returns the conditionId for a given questionId

getPositionId(bytes32,bool).notice: Returns the positionId for a given questionId and outcome

isAdmin(address).notice: Checks if an address is an admin

mergePositions(bytes32,uint256).notice: Merges a complete set of conditional tokens for a single question to collateral

prepareQuestion(bytes32,bytes).notice: Prepare a question for a given market

redeemPositions(bytes32,uint256[]).notice: Redeem a set of conditional tokens for collateral

renounceAdmin().notice: Renounces Admin privileges from the caller

reportOutcome(bytes32,bool).notice: Report the outcome of a question

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.notice: Proxies ERC1155 safeTransferFrom to the CTFCan only be called by an adminRequires this contract to be approved for allRequires the sender to be approved for all
